title: Cloud webapp 404 noise cleanup before acceptance
description: Identify and remove repetitive 404s in deployed cloud console (network/resource/API noise), while preserving MQTT primary realtime behavior. Capture concrete failing URLs and fix routing/assets/API calls before human UX testing.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Started targeted investigation of cloud console 404 noise after functional gate pass.
Evidence: prior Gate6 logs show repeated generic 404 resource failures during steady-state runtime.
Next: capture exact failing URLs from browser network logs, patch offending route/resource calls, and re-run pre-acceptance gate6.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Eliminated cloud console 404 spam by adding telemetry ingest endpoint support in console_lambda.
Evidence: POST /dev/anthus/kanbus/api/telemetry/console now returns 204; Playwright network capture reports NO_404 after login/runtime wait.
Next: finalize patch commit/push and keep watching for any additional non-telemetry 404 regressions in pre-acceptance runs.
Risk/Blocker: none.
